en: After the death of Joshua, the people of Israel inquired of the LORD, "Who shall go up first for us against the Canaanites, to fight against them?"
zh: 約書亞死後，以色列人求問耶和華說：“誰要為我們首先去攻打迦南人，與他們作戰呢？”

en: The LORD said, "Judah shall go up; behold, I have given the land into his hand."
zh: 耶和華回答：“猶大要先上去，看哪，我已經把那地交在他手中。”

en: And Judah said to Simeon his brother, "Come up with me into the territory allotted to me, that we may fight against the Canaanites. And I likewise will go with you into the territory allotted to you." So Simeon went with him.
zh: 猶大對自己的兄弟西緬說：“請你與我一同上我抽籤所得的地業去，我們好與迦南人交戰；以後我也與你一同到你抽籤所得的地業去。”於是西緬與他一同去了。

en: Then Judah went up and the LORD gave the Canaanites and the Perizzites into their hand, and they defeated 10,000 of them at Bezek.
zh: 猶大上去了；耶和華就把迦南人和比利洗人交在他們手中；他們在比色擊殺了一萬人。

en: They found Adoni-bezek at Bezek and fought against him and defeated the Canaanites and the Perizzites.
zh: 他們在那裡遇見了比色王，就與他交戰，擊殺了迦南人和比利洗人。

en: Adoni-bezek fled, but they pursued him and caught him and cut off his thumbs and his big toes.
zh: 比色王逃跑；他們追趕他，把他捉住，砍去了他手腳的大拇指。

en: And Adoni-bezek said, "Seventy kings with their thumbs and their big toes cut off used to pick up scraps under my table. As I have done, so God has repaid me." And they brought him to Jerusalem, and he died there.
zh: 比色王說：“從前有七十個王，手腳的大拇指都被我砍去，在我的桌子底下拾取食物；現在 神照著我所行的，報應我了。”於是他們把他帶到耶路撒冷，後來他就死在那裡。

en: And the men of Judah fought against Jerusalem and captured it and struck it with the edge of the sword and set the city on fire.
zh: 猶大人攻打耶路撒冷，把城佔領，用刀擊殺了城中的居民，又放火燒城。

en: And afterward the men of Judah went down to fight against the Canaanites who lived in the hill country, in the Negeb, and in the lowland.
zh: 後來，猶大人下去，與住在山地、南地和高原的迦南人交戰。

en: And Judah went against the Canaanites who lived in Hebron (now the name of Hebron was formerly Kiriath-arba), and they defeated Sheshai and Ahiman and Talmai.
zh: 猶大人又去攻擊住在希伯崙的迦南人，殺了示篩、亞希幔和撻買；希伯崙從前名叫基列．亞巴。

en: From there they went against the inhabitants of Debir. The name of Debir was formerly Kiriath-sepher.
zh: 他們從那裡又去攻擊底璧的居民；底璧從前名叫基列．西弗。

en: And Caleb said, "He who attacks Kiriath-sepher and captures it, I will give him Achsah my daughter for a wife."
zh: 迦勒說：“誰能攻打基列．西弗，把城攻取，我就把我的女兒押撒給他作妻子。”

en: And Othniel the son of Kenaz, Caleb's younger brother, captured it. And he gave him Achsah his daughter for a wife.
zh: 迦勒的弟弟基納斯的兒子俄陀聶攻取了那城，迦勒就把自己的女兒押撒給他作妻子。

en: When she came to him, she urged him to ask her father for a field. And she dismounted from her donkey, and Caleb said to her, "What do you want?"
zh: 押撒出嫁的時候，她勸俄陀聶向她父親求一塊田；押撒一下驢，迦勒就對她說：“你要甚麼？”

en: She said to him, "Give me a blessing. Since you have set me in the land of the Negeb, give me also springs of water." And Caleb gave her the upper springs and the lower springs.
zh: 她回答：“請你給我一份禮物；你既然把我安置在南地，求你也把水泉賜給我。”迦勒就把上泉和下泉都給了她。

en: And the descendants of the Kenite, Moses' father-in-law, went up with the people of Judah from the city of palms into the wilderness of Judah, which lies in the Negeb near Arad, and they went and settled with the people.
zh: 摩西岳父的子孫基尼人，和猶大人一同離開棕樹城，上到亞拉得以南的猶大曠野去，住在那裡的人民中。

en: And Judah went with Simeon his brother, and they defeated the Canaanites who inhabited Zephath and devoted it to destruction. So the name of the city was called Hormah.
zh: 猶大與他的兄弟西緬同去，擊殺了住在洗法的迦南人，把那城完全毀滅。那城的名字就叫何珥瑪。

en: Judah also captured Gaza with its territory, and Ashkelon with its territory, and Ekron with its territory.
zh: 猶大又攻取了迦薩和迦薩的四境，亞實基倫和亞實基倫的四境，以革倫和以革倫的四境。

en: And the LORD was with Judah, and he took possession of the hill country, but he could not drive out the inhabitants of the plain because they had chariots of iron.
zh: 耶和華與猶大同在，猶大就佔領了山地；但不能趕走平原的居民，因為他們有鐵車。

en: And Hebron was given to Caleb, as Moses had said. And he drove out from it the three sons of Anak.
zh: 猶大照著摩西的吩咐，把希伯崙給了迦勒；迦勒就從那裡趕走亞衲子孫的三族。

en: But the people of Benjamin did not drive out the Jebusites who lived in Jerusalem, so the Jebusites have lived with the people of Benjamin in Jerusalem to this day.
zh: 便雅憫人沒有趕走住在耶路撒冷的耶布斯人，所以耶布斯人與便雅憫人一同住在耶路撒冷，直到今日。

en: The house of Joseph also went up against Bethel, and the LORD was with them.
zh: 約瑟家也上去攻打伯特利；耶和華與他們同在。

en: And the house of Joseph scouted out Bethel. (Now the name of the city was formerly Luz.)
zh: 約瑟家派人去窺探伯特利。那城從前的名字叫路斯。

en: And the spies saw a man coming out of the city, and they said to him, "Please show us the way into the city, and we will deal kindly with you."
zh: 窺探的人看見一個人從城裡出來，就對他說：“請你把進城的路指示我們，我們必恩待你。”

en: And he showed them the way into the city. And they struck the city with the edge of the sword, but they let the man and all his family go.
zh: 那人把進城的路指示了他們，他們就用刀擊殺了那城的居民，卻把那人和他的全家都放走。

en: And the man went to the land of the Hittites and built a city and called its name Luz. That is its name to this day.
zh: 那人到赫人之地去了，築了一座城，給它起名叫路斯；直到今日那城還叫這名。

en: Manasseh did not drive out the inhabitants of Beth-shean and its villages, or Taanach and its villages, or the inhabitants of Dor and its villages, or the inhabitants of Ibleam and its villages, or the inhabitants of Megiddo and its villages, for the Canaanites persisted in dwelling in that land.
zh: 瑪拿西沒有趕走伯．善和屬於伯．善的鄉村的居民，他納和屬於他納的鄉村的居民，多珥和屬於多珥的鄉村的居民，以伯蓮和屬於以伯蓮的鄉村的居民，米吉多和屬於米吉多的鄉村的居民；迦南人決意住在那地。

en: When Israel grew strong, they put the Canaanites to forced labor, but did not drive them out completely.
zh: 到以色列強盛了，就迫使迦南人作苦工，但沒有把他們完全趕走。

en: And Ephraim did not drive out the Canaanites who lived in Gezer, so the Canaanites lived in Gezer among them.
zh: 以法蓮也沒有把住在基色的迦南人趕走，於是迦南人還住在基色，在以法蓮中間。

en: Zebulun did not drive out the inhabitants of Kitron, or the inhabitants of Nahalol, so the Canaanites lived among them, but became subject to forced labor.
zh: 西布倫沒有把基倫的居民和拿哈拉的居民趕走；於是迦南人還住在西布倫中間，成了作苦工的人。

en: Asher did not drive out the inhabitants of Acco, or the inhabitants of Sidon or of Ahlab or of Achzib or of Helbah or of Aphik or of Rehob,
zh: 亞設沒有把亞柯的居民和西頓的居民趕走，也沒有把亞黑拉、亞革悉、黑巴、亞弗革和利合的居民趕走。

en: so the Asherites lived among the Canaanites, the inhabitants of the land, for they did not drive them out.
zh: 於是亞設人住在當地的居民迦南人中間，因為他們沒有把他們趕走。

en: Naphtali did not drive out the inhabitants of Beth-shemesh, or the inhabitants of Beth-anath, so they lived among the Canaanites, the inhabitants of the land. Nevertheless, the inhabitants of Beth-shemesh and of Beth-anath became subject to forced labor for them.
zh: 拿弗他利沒有把伯．示麥的居民和伯．亞納的居民趕走；於是他們就住在當地的居民迦南人中間；伯．示麥和伯．亞納的居民成了給他們作苦工的人。

en: The Amorites pressed the people of Dan back into the hill country, for they did not allow them to come down to the plain.
zh: 亞摩利人強迫但人退回山地上，不容他們下到平原來。

en: The Amorites persisted in dwelling in Mount Heres, in Aijalon, and in Shaalbim, but the hand of the house of Joseph rested heavily on them, and they became subject to forced labor.
zh: 亞摩利人決意住在希烈山、亞雅崙和沙賓；但約瑟家的勢力強大以後，他們就成了作苦工的人。

en: And the border of the Amorites ran from the ascent of Akrabbim, from Sela and upward.
zh: 亞摩利人的境界，是從亞克拉濱山坡，從西拉直上。
